sectionIntro.title: Trusted by students, families, and volunteers.
sectionIntro.description: The most meaningful measure of impact is how students feel when they leave: excited, proud, and ready to keep building.

items.name: Student Participant
items.quote: I liked that we could build our own ideas and still get help when we got stuck. It made coding feel fun instead of scary.

items.name: Parent Supporter
items.quote: The program felt organized, welcoming, and encouraging. My child left talking about projects instead of worrying about whether they were good enough.

items.name: Volunteer Mentor
items.quote: Free Code Juniors creates the kind of learning environment where students feel safe asking questions and genuinely proud of their progress.
